findings.evidence: `rg -n "theorem fixingSubgroup_univ|TauCeti.fixingSubgroup_univ" code mathlib` shows the generic theorem only at `TauCeti/Geometry/Diffeomorphism/FixingSubgroup.lean:49` and its only use in this file at line 104; Mathlib provides the underlying fixer API in `Mathlib/GroupTheory/GroupAction/FixingSubgroup.lean:113-153` and the faithfulness criterion `fixedBy_eq_univ_iff_eq_one` in `Mathlib/GroupTheory/GroupAction/FixedPoints.lean:261`.
findings.fix: Move the generic lemma to an earlier generic group-action file such as a new `TauCeti/Algebra/Group/FixingSubgroup.lean` importing `Mathlib.GroupTheory.GroupAction.FixingSubgroup`, or keep it private/local and prove only the diffeomorphism specialization here.
findings.issue: `TauCeti.fixingSubgroup_univ` is a fully generic `[Group G] [MulAction G α] [FaithfulSMul G α]` theorem, not diffeomorphism-specific, so placing it in `Geometry/Diffeomorphism/FixingSubgroup.lean` makes algebraic group-action API depend on a geometry file.

summary: The diffeomorphism-relative API is in the natural diffeomorphism-action file with direct imports, but the file also exports a generic group-action theorem from the geometry namespace.
